circular_title: MCA Notification: LLP Annual Filing Deadline - FY 2025-26
circular_summary: LLP Form 11 annual return due date extended to July 15, 2026.
actions: Note for awareness — no immediate action required for Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd.
email_subject: Compliance Advisory: MCA Notification: LLP Annual Filing Deadline - FY 2025-26
email_body:
{
  "subject": "MCA Notification: LLP Annual Filing Deadline - FY 2025-26",
  "body": "Dear Neha Kapoor, 

We are writing to inform you of the MCA notification regarding the LLP annual filing deadline for FY 2025-26, which is relevant to Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd. as it is a private limited company that may have dealings or interactions with Limited Liability Partnerships (LLPs). This notification serves as a general awareness update for your company.

The required actions for your company are:
1. Note for awareness — no immediate action required for Kapoor Tech Solutions Pvt. Ltd.

There is no specific deadline for this notification. As the risk level is LOW, there is no penalty specified for missing any deadline.

Please be assured that we are monitoring the situation and will inform you if any action is required from your end. If you have any questions or need assistance, please do not hesitate to reach out to us.

Best regards,
Compliance Advisory Team"
}
internal_notes: No specific obligations for this client, general awareness of RBI directions on Rupee Interest Rate Derivatives
